# claudeplatform_workspace_member (Resource)

Membership of an organization member in a workspace. Import with "workspace_id/user_id".

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claudeplatform_user" "alice" {
  email = "alice@example.com"
}

resource "claudeplatform_workspace" "ml_team" {
  name = "ml-team"
}

resource "claudeplatform_workspace_member" "alice" {
  workspace_id   = claudeplatform_workspace.ml_team.id
  user_id        = data.claudeplatform_user.alice.id
  workspace_role = "workspace_developer"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_id` (String) Organization member user ID (user_...).
- `workspace_id` (String) Workspace ID (wrkspc_...).
- `workspace_role` (String) Role in the workspace.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import using "workspace_id/user_id".
terraform import claudeplatform_workspace_member.alice wrkspc_01WgQMyXabc123/user_01AbCdEfgh456
```
